text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Nishino Flower and I are on our way
back from shopping, when...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! It looks like they're holding the raffle
over there!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wow! All the prizes are incredible! The worker at
the grocery store wasn't kidding!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I only have one ticket and one chance. Just like in
a race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The grocery store worker from earlier actually
offered Nishino Flower a hundred raffle tickets,
but she politely declined.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you wanna give it a try? Here's hoping you
get a good prize!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! And yes, I'd like to try my luck,
please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower gives the raffle machine's lever a
vigorous spin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wow!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wooow!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I got the grand prize!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
A hot spring vacation... That feels like such a
grown-up thing to go to.
choice_data_list: You'll need to go with a chaperone.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh... That's right. I'm still too young to go alone...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'll ask my parents. And, um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me? Can this coupon be used for four
people?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: I should think so! I'll check for you later!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! That means you can come too,
Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've never been to a hot spring before... but
adults like that kind of thing, right?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Those who like hot springs reeeally like
them.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: That makes sense! Is this hot spring nice?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
It sure is! I've got someone in my family who's
really picky about hot springs, but they've given
that one their seal of approval!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: That's great! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Now I definitely want you to come, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'd really like to go to such a nice place with you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, but that's only if you want to, of course...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's just, I think it'll definitely be more fun with
you there!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: So please come!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Come on, you've got to go! How can you refuse
such a heartfelt request?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Nishino Flower and I make a promise to
go on vacation together once things aren't so
busy.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wow! What a fancy hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Just thinking about eating it is making me
excited.
choice_data_list: You like hamburger steaks that much, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yup! My mom always made them for me when I
did well on a test or won a race.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
To me, hamburger steaks are filled with love and
kindness...
choice_data_list:
Its flavor must be filled with happy memories for
you.

Its flavor must be filled with happy memories for
you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: It is! What about you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I've eaten them both on special and
regular days, but I can't really remember. I'm
always so busy that it all blurs together.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, if you'd like, why don't we split this
hamburger steak?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
We can have it to commemorate winning first
prize in the raffle!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And from now on, I'll make us a bunch of
hamburger steaks whenever something good
happens!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Actually, it doesn't have to be hamburger steaks.
I'll make you whatever you want, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'll help you make all kinds of special memories
that you can think back fondly on! ♪

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wow! Look at all these carrots!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
They're all firm, and the roots are nice and evenly
spread. They look sweet, too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm pretty confident when it comes to
judging fruits and vegetables!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I help out at home, I get put in charge
of picking ingredients at the shops. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, my parents always got so happy
whenever the employees at the supermarket
praised me...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Their smiles would be so big and warm.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I always did my best when picking, since I wanted
to see those smiles.
choice_data_list: You know what? I have an idea.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You do?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh! Mom! Dad! Can you see me okay?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, great! My trainer's holding my phone right
now.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Did you get dinner ready as well? It might be
through a screen, but let's eat together
tonight! ♪

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's so cute... ♪

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Sorry you didn't get a bigger prize. I hope you're
not disappointed.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! I mean, just look at how delicious this
carrot looks!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It may be small, but it's such a lovely orange
color. I bet it'll be great stewed. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Are you free tonight, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
If you are, I say we warm ourselves up with some
carrot soup! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a very cold night, but Nishino Flower's
homemade carrot soup keeps both our hearts and
bodies nice and toasty.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Aww...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: No, not at all!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Now I can give anyone a tissue when they need
one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At first, Nishino Flower doesn't seem upset, but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I bet Trainer would've been really happy if I won the
grand prize...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I really wish I had won it...
